description*.en: A "Micro Canonical Partition Function" applies to a micro canonical ensemble, in which the system is allowed to exchange heat with the environment at fixed temperature, volume, and a fixed number of particles.

title: MicroCanonicalPartitionFunction
description: A "Micro Canonical Partition Function" applies to a micro canonical ensemble, in which the system is allowed to exchange heat with the environment at fixed temperature, volume, and a fixed number of particles.
